rag_rules: Validator diagnostics must be resolved by precise repair without altering unrelated architecture elements.
AGREE contracts must use only visible identifiers and types from the AADL model.
Assumptions and guarantees must be placed in valid component type or implementation scopes.
generic_rules: Stateful equations in AGREE should use initialized temporal recurrence patterns.
Branching logic in AGREE should use nested if-then-else expressions.
Generated AGREE code must not introduce package-qualified identifiers not present in the model.
Output dependency guarantees should relate visible inputs to visible outputs.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use AGREE logical operators (and, or, not, =>) for contract expressions.
Ensure type consistency between helper declarations and their expressions.
anti_patterns: Avoid introducing package-qualified identifiers that are not part of the analyzed model.
Do not reference implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type contracts.
irrelevant_topics: AADL Inspector diagnostics about package or property set visibility
Component type vs implementation scope placement rules for annexes
